Filter Enrichment Results

Source: R/functional_analysis.R
filter_enrichment_results.Rd

Filters enrichment results by p-value and optional intersection-size bounds. It assumes that the results are from a run of gprofiler2::gost.

Usage

filter_enrichment_results(
  enrichment_result,
  p_value_threshold = 0.05,
  intersection_size_upper = NULL,
  intersection_size_lower = NULL
)

Arguments

enrichment_result

A data frame or list containing enrichment results. If a list is provided, each element should correspond to a module. The elements will be automatically combined into a one data frame.

p_value_threshold

Numeric threshold for adjusted p-values. Defaults to 0.05.

intersection_size_upper

Optional upper bound for intersection size.

intersection_size_lower

Optional lower bound for intersection size.

Value

A filtered enrichment data frame, or NULL if no rows pass filters.
